event_notes: Courses 2, 3M, and 4 disqualified due to misplaced controls; no O' Series or WIOL points awarded.
event_comments:
Due to several misplaced controls, Courses 2, 3M, and 4 were disqualified.
We regret the errors and will strive to avoid them in the future.
No O' Series or WIOL points will be awarded for this meet.
novice orienteer
